headlines.title: FDA grants quick review for 3 psychedelic drug trials
headlines.description: The Food and Drug Administration on Friday granted a quick review of three experimental psychedelic drugs meant to treat major depression and post-traumatic stress disorder.

headlines.title: FDA approves first gene therapy for genetic hearing loss
headlines.description: The Food and Drug Administration on Thursday approved Regeneron’s Otarmeni, the first gene therapy for genetic hearing loss

headlines.title: Rectal cancer deaths rising rapidly among millennials: 'It's a medical crisis'
headlines.description: Deaths from rectal cancer are rising rapidly among younger adults, an alarming trend that is confounding scientists trying to understand why millennials are so hard-hit.

headlines.title: What does it take to protect brain health? 10 habits to start now
headlines.description: Brain health is of paramount importance to nearly all Americans, yet few are aware of the latest science on how to nurture it

headlines.title: Pancreatic cancer mRNA vaccine shows lasting results in an early trial
headlines.description: Nearly all of the patients who responded to the a personalized mRNA pancreatic vaccine are still alive six years later.

headlines.title: FDA Moves to Fast-Track Three Psychedelic Drugs for Review
headlines.description: The FDA is fast-tracking three psychedelic drugs for treatment-resistant depression, major depressive disorder and PTSD. President Donald Trump ordered the expedited review last weekend. NBC’s Anne Thompson reports for Saturday TODAY.

headlines.title: FDA moves to fast-track three psychedelic drugs for review
headlines.description: A day after the DOJ said it would ease restrictions on medical marijuana, the FDA moves to fast-track some experimental psychedelic drugs for review. They're looking at three drugs for treatment-resistant depression, major depressive disorder, and PTSD. NBC's Anne Thompson reports.

headlines.title: Teenagers born in 2009 will be banned for life from purchasing cigarettes in the U.K.
headlines.description: A new law passed in the British Parliament will not allow people born after January 1, 2009 to ever legally buy cigarettes in U.K. NBC News' Raf Sanchez reports on how residents are handling the change.

headlines.title: FDA grants quick review for 3 psychedelic drug trials
headlines.description: The Food and Drug Administration granted a quick review of three experimental psychedelic drugs meant to treat major depression and post-traumatic stress disorder. NBC News' Erika Edwards reports on the specific drugs under review and how the FDA determines whether they are safe and effective.

headlines.title: Expert-approved walking pads that help you sit less and move more
headlines.description: Fitness trainers share the benefits of using walking pads daily for up to 60 mins. and safety tips. Plus, shop the best expert-approved walking pads.

headlines.title: The best spin shoes of 2026, according to spin instructors
headlines.description: Our experts share their favorite spin shoes, plus what to look for in fit and feel. Shop picks from Shimano, Tiem, Peloton and more.

headlines.title: Amazfit vs. Garmin: Can a $100 fitness tracker compete with an $1,100 one?
headlines.description: The $100 Amazfit Active 2 can’t be as good as the $1,100 Garmin Fenix 8, right? I tested both for over a month to find out.
